description: issue #332 (A2): executing the bare `why` meta-command emits exactly one `tutor-output` event with `command: "why"`, a non-empty `segments` array, and no `diagnostic_code`/`target_source_span` — `why` is the only statement, so it reports on the whole program (spec/execution-model.md#tutor-output-educational-profile); the diagnostic arm is out of scope here since a runtime diagnostic halts execution terminally, so a `why` call can never observe a diagnostic from its own run.

segments: Here is why your program behaves the way it does.
